title: 🎥 Animebox
line1: Animebox is a full-stack web application designed for users to explore seasonal releases and engage through community reviews.
line2: The website was built using Next.js, TypeScript, TalwindCSS, and Supabase.

title: 🎨 Palettes
line1: Palettes features a random color generator where users can generate up to 8 colors. The color generator has the following features: color locking, undo button, and brightness adjustment.
line2: The website was built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
